overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character walking through a rain-soaked, dark urban environment. The character moves along an elevated walkway past a large tree and approaches a graffiti-covered concrete building, with heavy rain and fog creating an atmospheric, tense mood.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-slicked elevated walkway with tree planter and benches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet pathway toward a large tree in a concrete planter

entered.detail: large tree growing in a raised square concrete planter box in the middle of the walkway
wavy patterned metal railing running along the left edge of the walkway
wooden slatted bench positioned on the right side of the path
tall cylindrical concrete structure with curved facade visible in the distance on the left

segments.scene_description: The character walks forward along a rain-soaked elevated walkway. A large tree in a concrete planter dominates the center of the path ahead, while a wooden bench sits to the right. Metal railings line the left side, and a cylindrical concrete building looms in the foggy distance.

events.description: character begins turning left toward the building wall
white graffiti mural on building wall becomes clearly visible as character approaches

agents.ego_description: turning left and approaching the graffiti-covered building wall while continuing to walk

entered.detail: large white spray-painted graffiti artwork covering the lower section of the concrete building wall

segments.scene_description: The character turns left toward the cylindrical concrete building, revealing a large white graffiti mural on its wall. The tree recedes into the background on the right as the character approaches the building wall, with rain continuing to fall heavily.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-soaked elevated walkway that leads toward a looming, graffiti-covered concrete structure. It begins with the character walking forward past a wooden bench and a large tree rooted in a concrete planter, while metal railings line the path under a heavy fog. As the character advances, the perspective shifts left, causing the tree to recede into the background on the right. The scene then opens up to reveal a large white graffiti mural on the wall of a cylindrical concrete building. Finally, the camera closes in on the building's weathered surface as the rain continues to fall heavily.
